---
title: "Hello there!"
pagetitle: "Nakul R. Padalkar"
description-meta: "Nakul R. Padalkar is an associate professor at GBoston University's Metropolitan College."
main-photo: /assets/images/bryan-brittos-slMcaf6sULE-unsplash.jpg
main-photo-square: /assets/images/bryan-brittos-slMcaf6sULE-unsplash.jpg
# title-block-banner: "#FFB627"
format:
  html:
    quarto-template-params:
      banner-header-class: "home"
---

Here is my front page, the main page of my website. I am Nakul R. Padalkar, an associate professor at Boston University's Metropolitan College. I am a researcher in the field of Information Systems and have a keen interest in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and data science.
